title: Opening for Software Engineer at FarmERP South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Opening for Software Engineer at FarmERP South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at FarmERP South Asia Partners. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Software Engineer to strengthen our Allahabad-based team.

About FarmERP South Asia Partners:
FarmERP South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Go

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FarmERP South Asia Partners!
